review_title: The Easy Way to Improve Your Website's Search Engine Ranking
description: In overall, we like it and we use it on most of our sites since we get use to it and also with the one click setup that is easy and convenient.
author: Diing Shiang W.
pros: These are the 3 Pros of using SEOPress. 1) We really like the easy to use configuration setting and user friendly dashboard. 2) Especially for keywords and backlinks tracking, we are able to view the important metrics within the dashboard. If we would want more, we will export to other SEO keyword tracking tools to extract more data.3) Lastly, it's affordable for unlimited sites and additional $20 discount if purchase both plugins together.
cons: Sometimes we might need extra customization on the dashboard and unfortunately we can't customize the overall dashboard to our needs. Since it extract so much data, we need a powerful hosting. I think 2GB and above should be fine but still imagine if have more than 10 sites on the same server, it might slow things down and even crash the server. Solution is to schedule at different timing.

description: A comprehensive WordPress SEO tool with a lot of helpful features. Is lightweight and I didn't saw any page speed impact after installing it. SEOPress is compatible with all other themes and plugins providing a great boost in search engines for any website.
author: Robert G.
pros: I like that SEOPress gives you steps for improving SEO score on each page and article. These are easy to follow and understand, providing big improvements on search engines with visible results quite fast.
cons: Everything is working good, didn't find anything I can say I don't like.

description: It's my favorite free SEO plugin. Very user-friendly and easy to use. On the other hand it's not my first choice for the paid plans.
author: Ekaterina P.
pros: Its very easy to install. The plugin is really user friendly and does not require of a big SEO to do the setup. Also, I think it's the best option for those looking for a free SEO plugin. Finally, the instant indexation system is very useful.
cons: I'm not a big fan of how they manage the SCHEMA markup on the free version - it's quite limited.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: SEOPress is a well-built WordPress plugin that helps manage your website's SEO. Is easy to setup and use having a lot of good features that really helps your website rank higher.
author: Dean H.
pros: SEOPress is easy to use and easy on the hosting resources. The setup of the plugin was straightforward but you need some basic SEO knowledge. It already has JSON schema and sitemap integrated, which allows you to drop other plugins that handle these.
cons: I did not encounter any problems with SEOPress until now.

description: I consider SEOPress maybe the best WordPress plugins for SEO management. It has many features already integrated and saves you time from install and setup other plugins (xml sitemap, schema, etc). The plugin is lightweight and does not have a negative impact on the loading speed.
author: Lee W.
pros: SEOPress is a reliable plugins for every WordPress Install. It gives a helping hand with Title and metas for every page and content analysis feature ensure every page has the best SEO optimization. Sitemap is managed by SEOPress and you will not need another plugin installed. It handles SEO for images and JSON SChemas for a increased search presence.
cons: There are no cons for SEOPress from my side.

description: I really like SEOPress because is alight weight plugin wich does not increase the website loading time and is easy to setup. The price for this plugin is affordable and features offered are more than you are paying.
author: Daniela Petronela H.
pros: With SEOPress i managed to increase my website traffic and sales. With SEOPress optimizing each page is made easy with the guides offered. With SCHEMA markup integratation i can create rich snippets for my products and services offering my website a nice view on search engines. Tracking the keywords and backlinks with this plugin is easy and you don't need any other third party apps and software.
cons: The plugin has cons but not worth mentioning here because these could be just for my needs.

review_title: Probably the best SEO plugin, but support should improve.
description: My overall experience is good. I use it on most of my websites and I'm very happy with them, they're definitely the best SEO plugin and their quality-price ratio on the PRO version is very good. My only complain to them is that once I had a problem cause by an incoptheir support wasn't very "supportive" once I had an incompatibility issue with them. But in the end, it ended up well.
author: Marco Genaro P.
pros: I use it for many websites and it's definitely the best SEO plugin on the market. Cheap, many cool features, quite advanced SCHEMA markup integratation.
cons: Support. I had a problem once and instead of trying to help they were trying to convince me that their plugin wasn't the problem. I managed to make them understand it after 2 days.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Khushbu P.
pros: SEOPress is iimpressive at generating sitemaps, breadcrumbs and more. It is also eeasy to install and lightweight plugin for wordpress.
cons: There are no cons found so far using the plugin.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
